creator: kwm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 199958
Netbeans 10.0 vc4

This is the release candidate for netbeans 10.0. I want to wait for this version since it adds back support for other languages then Java. I'm using this on 11.2-R amd64 with openjdk8-8.181.13_1. Granted I'm only using it to write PHP so far.

I have no idea when it will be release. And if you want to try it out you can try this version.
